attacking_style: Long-range solo efforts in the final 15km, capable of sustaining significant time gaps to win from distance rather than explosive short attacks.
team_tactics: SUNWEB deploys sophisticated dual breakaway infiltration tactics, using multiple riders (KELDERMAN as pace-setter) to set up BANULS' decisive move.
terrain_preference: Terrain allowing sustained solo efforts over 15km; benefits from courses where constant power output can create separation rather than punchy climbs.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify specific weaknesses; only single race observation available from early 2020 season.
key_patterns: Requires only single observation - insufficient data for pattern identification
SUNWEB team orchestration crucial to creating winning platform
Capable of converting breakaway positioning into GC threat status
form_trajectory: unknown: only one observation from March 2020; no subsequent data to assess trajectory or consistency
